'''Quality Electronics of Torina''' was a small company on the planet [[Torina]] notorious for its cheap knockoffs of normally expensive technological goods. They had offices and major retail outlets on [[Coyn]], [[Lanthrym]], Torina, and [[Elrood/Legends|Elrood]] proper and their products were available through independent merchants throughout the [[Elrood sector/Legends|Elrood sector]].

{{Company-stub}}
